mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN billing_cycle = '1M' THEN price WHEN billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN FLOOR(price / 12) ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM add_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= #{monthStart})

SELECT a.subscription_id AS subscriptionId, s.item_name AS itemName, CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1M' THEN a.price WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN FLOOR(a.price / 12) ELSE 0 END AS price, DAY(a.start_date) AS payDay FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id WHERE a.user_id = ${userId} AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart});

SELECT s.item_name AS itemName, CASE WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1M' THEN a.price WHEN a.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN FLOOR(a.price / 12) ELSE 0 END AS price, DAY(a.start_date) AS billingDay FROM add_subscription a JOIN subscription_item s ON a.item_id = s.item_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.start_date < #{nextMonthStart} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{monthStart}) AND DAY(a.start_date) = #{startDate}
